series_metadata.series_description: PAYROLL WARRANT CANCELLATION ADVISE & TRANSMITTAL. USED TO CANCEL A PAYROLL WARRANT ISSUED BY AN AGENCY IN ERROR.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: RETAIN ONE YEAR IN OFFICE AND THREE YEARS IN THE STATE RECORD CENTER. DESTROY PROVIDED AUDITED BY AUDITOR OF STATE AND AUDIT REPORT IS RELEASED., Paper: Trash
